name: Saratoga Gelato
style_description: Downtown Saratoga Springs gelato shop with house-made Italian gelato, a broad gluten-free selection, and repeatedly documented gluten-free cone availability.

reviews.quote: They offer many gluten-free flavors and a gluten-free cone.
The restaurant offers a variety of dietary-friendly options, including gluten-free cones.

llm_summary: High-confidence gluten-free cone stop: official site confirms a gluten-free gelato selection and third-party gluten-free guides specifically call out gluten-free cones at the Broadway Saratoga location.

photo_evidence.caption: Official Saratoga Gelato stracciatella product photo showing a gelato scoop in a cone-style waffle cup, matching the shop's real product presentation.
Official Saratoga Gelato pistachio gelato product photo from the shop's flavor gallery.
Official Saratoga Gelato raspberry gelato product photo documenting real flavor imagery from the Saratoga Springs shop.

review_highlights.quote: Everything in the case is gluten free ... gluten free sugar cones.

historical_context: A strong Saratoga anchor for this map because the shop combines current gluten-free cone reports with official product imagery and a walkable downtown location.

name: The Country Drive-In
style_description: Classic Clifton Park seasonal drive-in whose official ice cream menu explicitly says it has gluten-free cones alongside soft serve, yogurt cones, sundaes, floats, and other stand staples.
llm_summary: Highest-confidence cone evidence in the set: Country Drive-In's own menu states 'We have Gluten Free Cones!' directly under Ice Cream Cones & Dishes.

photo_evidence.caption: Official Country Drive-In strawberry sundae menu image showing a real ice cream specialty from the Clifton Park stand.
photo_evidence.credit: Official Country Drive-In ice cream menu

photo_evidence.caption: Official Country Drive-In hot fudge parfait menu image, product-focused and tied to the named Clifton Park location.
photo_evidence.credit: Official Country Drive-In ice cream menu

photo_evidence.caption: Official Country Drive-In banana split menu image from the same ice cream menu that documents gluten-free cone availability.
photo_evidence.credit: Official Country Drive-In ice cream menu

historical_context: Important because the gluten-free cone claim is not inferred from reviews: it is published by the business on the current ice cream menu.

name: Kurver Kreme
style_description: Albany soft-serve institution on Central Avenue, serving the Capital Region since 1952, with current review aggregation specifically noting gluten-free cones and cross-contamination-aware service.

reviews.quote: They do have gluten free cones too!

llm_summary: A classic Albany inclusion: official site verifies the business and real product imagery; current review aggregation specifically reports gluten-free cones and attentive handling for a gluten-free order.

photo_evidence.caption: Official Kurver Kreme product image showing a soft-serve cup beside classic stand food, with branded tray context from the Albany shop.
Official Kurver Kreme banner image showing a soft-serve cone/treat presentation from the Albany stand.

review_highlights.quote: When my daughter told the server that her order was gluten free they cleaned the ice cream machine.

historical_context: Kurver Kreme adds a central Albany soft-serve lineage to the gluten-free cone map, but its cone evidence is review-backed rather than directly published on the official menu.

name: Dairy Haus
style_description: Handmade hard and soft ice cream stand north of downtown Saratoga Springs, operating since 1985, with Times Union coverage noting gluten-free cones among its dietary options.

reviews.source: Times Union National Ice Cream Day guide
reviews.quote: Here you'll find a heap of hard and soft ice cream flavors, including dairy-free options and gluten-free cones.

llm_summary: Dairy Haus is a strong Saratoga County stop because the official site documents handmade ice cream and exact address, while regional press explicitly records gluten-free cone availability.

photo_evidence.caption: Official Dairy Haus photo of scoops in a cup and cone held in front of the Saratoga Springs stand.
Official Dairy Haus ice cream image used as the site's primary product image.
Official Dairy Haus product/stand image from the shop's homepage gallery.

historical_context: Dairy Haus broadens the map northward while staying inside the Capital Region, with both hard and soft ice cream represented.

name: Snowman Ice Cream
style_description: Long-running Troy ice cream stand with hard ice cream, soft serve, sundaes, pies, and regional coverage documenting gluten-free cone availability.

reviews.source: Times Union National Ice Cream Day guide
reviews.quote: Here you'll find a heap of hard and soft ice cream flavors, including dairy-free options and gluten-free cones.

llm_summary: Snowman is a core Troy inclusion: exact place verified through official site/gallery and regional food coverage, with product imagery from the shop's own GetBento gallery.

photo_evidence.caption: Official Snowman Ice Cream product photo showing an ice cream sandwich/treat with the Troy shop's sign behind it.
Official Snowman Ice Cream half-gallon product photo from the Troy shop's food and drink gallery.
Official Snowman peppermint ice cream pie photo, documenting the shop's actual frozen dessert program.

historical_context: Snowman gives the dataset an east-side/Troy anchor and a deeper dessert program beyond cones alone.

name: JJ's Snack Bar
style_description: Ballston Spa snack bar with a classic ice cream menu, local customer evidence for gluten-free cones, and Google-sourced product photos tied to the exact address.

reviews.quote: Extensive ice cream menu for sure. Fast and friendly service. Offer gluten free cones too.

llm_summary: JJ's is a useful Ballston Spa edge case: the gluten-free cone claim is customer/review based, but the page provides exact address, phone, and product photos from the named location.

photo_evidence.caption: Google-sourced JJ's Snack Bar banana split/product photo tied to the 2 Saratoga Ave listing.
photo_evidence.credit: JJ's Snack Bar photo on Google via usarestaurants.info

photo_evidence.caption: Google-sourced JJ's Snack Bar tray photo at the Ballston Spa stand; included as location-tied context.

historical_context: JJ's expands the map into Ballston Spa but remains review-confirmed rather than official-menu confirmed.

name: Emack & Bolio's
style_description: Albany location of the creative ice cream chain, known locally for premium flavors and specialty cones; local list/review aggregation reports gluten-free cone availability.

reviews.quote: They do have gluten free cones too!

llm_summary: Emack & Bolio's gives the map a year-round Albany parlor with official Albany product photos and review-aggregated gluten-free cone evidence.

photo_evidence.caption: Official EBalbany product photo showing Emack & Bolio's scoops in a cereal-coated specialty cone.
Official EBalbany ice cream product image from the Albany shop website.
Albany.com listing image for Emack & Bolio's Albany, tied to the 366 Delaware Ave business profile.

historical_context: This entry represents the city-parlor side of the Capital Region gluten-free cone landscape, contrasting with seasonal roadside stands.
